bird.name: Peruvian wren
bird.summary: The Peruvian wren (Cinnycerthia peruana) is a species of bird in the family Troglodytidae. It is endemic to Peru.

locations.name: 亚马孙大区
locations.summary: 亚马孙大区是秘鲁北部的一个行政区，首府查查波亚斯。亚马孙大区西接卡哈马卡大区，南邻拉利伯塔德大区，东接洛雷托大区和圣马丁大区，北面和西面与厄瓜多尔接壤。 亚马孙区大部分面积被热带雨林覆盖（72.93%）。

locations.name: 阿亚库乔
locations.summary: 阿亚库乔（西班牙語：Ayacucho）是秘鲁的一个城市，隶属阿亚库乔大区瓦曼加省，为阿亚库乔大区首府。阿亚库乔市内有33座教堂，每一座代表耶稣生命的一年。阿亚库乔市人口151,019（2007年）。1824年，在此地发生了“阿亚库乔战役”…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Peruvian wren
relations.evidence: The Peruvian wren is found in the Andes of Peru between the departments of Amazonas and Ayacucho

relations.subject: Peruvian wren
relations.evidence: The Peruvian wren is found in the Andes of Peru between the departments of Amazonas and Ayacucho

relations.subject: Peruvian wren
relations.evidence: It inhabits wet montane forest, secondary forest, and their edges

relations.subject: Peruvian wren
relations.evidence: It inhabits wet montane forest, secondary forest, and their edges
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Peruvian wren
relations.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the Peruvian wren as being of Least Concern. It is "[q]uite common in suitable habitat in parts of its range" but its "population is suspected to be in decline owing to ongoing habitat destruction and fragmentation."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
